name: Dedup core
summary: Implement enough pairtools-compatible dedup behavior to run the real sorted pairsam pipeline.
goal: Implement streaming `pairs-rs dedup` for sorted `.pairs` and `.pairsam` input, routing nodups, duplicates, unmapped records, and simple stats.
explicit_non_goals: Do not implement select, split, stats, restrict, phase, sample, scaling, filterbycov, or parse2 behavior.
Do not optimize dedup before routing correctness tests pass.
Do not claim full pairtools dedup stats or SAM flag parity unless tests prove it.
Do not change parse, sort, select, or merge behavior.
acceptance_criteria: `pairs-rs dedup` routes nodups, duplicates, and unmapped records correctly on committed fixtures.
Duplicate records are marked with pair_type DD when `--mark-dups` is active.
`--output-stats` writes total, mapped, unmapped, duplicate, nodup, and fraction duplicate counts.
Unsupported dedup options fail loudly with `not implemented`.
known_risks: Full pairtools dedup includes richer stats, parent IDs, SAM duplicate flag parity, and backend options that are outside M150.
M151 adds production-shaped command validation before any broader real-pipeline dedup claim.
